notes: 0.3.12 replaces the stacked CUA scrub selector with the older direct-stick arbitration shape. Instead of hardcoding one assumed right-stick seam or letting the generic navigation wrapper leak in, the player now reads both direct stick lanes, picks the actually-active direct lane, keeps short continuity on that lane, and reports the real selected stick in status. The goal is to remove the hidden dependency on unrelated controller motion and make scrub live or die on one deterministic direct-input path.
